name: Salmon Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Fusilli or macaroni - cooked, drained and cooled
1 pint Cherry tomatoes - cut in half
1 cup Mozzarella cheese - cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon.
2. Toss the flaked salmon with the remaining ingredients in a large serving bowl.
3. Mix with Lemon Dressing and serve.
Lemon Dressing: Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, dill weed, grated lemon peel, and black pepper until well combined.
